prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-KIDPLOKIO-PARK Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Ultimate Toy Car Garage Diecast Vehicle Playset with 4 Diecast Cars, Boys Ages 3+ Description: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy urban parking garage and city streets with this Kidplokio Toy Car Parking Garage Playset. Kids imaginations will soar as they are inspired to create their own city driving adventures with friends and family. The toy vehicle play set for boys is a fun, city toy vehicle garage set, complete with three levels for parking, two ramps, multiple traffic signs, fueling stations and extended roadways and comes with x4 diecast cars.

Your little car enthusiasts can maneuver and park their collection of die cast cars throughout the parking garage and the sliding tracks allow them to quickly head out on the town. This multipiece diecast car Urban City Parking Garage is compatible with most common 1:64 model diecast cars, allowing your toddler to include all their collections of vehicles in on the fun. This city garage playset can also double as a storage spot for your child’s car collections too.

Some easy assembly is required to complete the Kidplokio Ultimate Parking Garage Playset; while working to put the garage playset together, little ones can grow confidence and pride while they help put everything together, including placing fun stickers. Once fully assembled, kids will enjoy endless hours of entertainment and creativity fueling up their vehicles, zooming around the garage ramps or moving road signs. Not only will little one's be occupied for hours with this diecast toy car garage vehicle play set, they'll also be developing crucial early educational skills such as fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination and problem solving.

Let the building begin.

Recommended Ages: 3+

Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: toy vehicle garage kids race cars boys toys diecast truck carrier track ultimate garage tower boys toys 3 4 5 6 7 year old stocking stuffer gifts Features: - DELUXE TOY CAR GARAGE DIECAST PLAY SET: Kids can recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy city parking garage with the Kidplokio DIY Urban Parking Garage Playset! The playset comes with 3levels for parking, 2 ramps, multiple traffic signs, fueling stations, extended roadways and x4 diecast cars - EASY DIY PLAY SET ASSEMBLY: Some easy DIY work is required to put together the Kidplokio DIY Urban Parking Garage Playset; while working to complete the assembly of the cars playset, little ones can grow confidence in their ability to problem solve and accomplish tasks! - IMAGINATIVE PRETEND PLAY: Once the assembly is complete, little car enthusiasts can maneuver their collection of diecast cars throughout the parking garage; hours of imaginative pretend play await! The Urban Garage Playset is compatible with most common 1:64 model cars allowing your toddler to include all their vehicles for endless opportunities for fun! - LEARNING AND EDUCATION TOYS FOR BOYS: Not only your littles one be occupied for hours with this Kidplokio Urban Garage Playset, they'll be engaging crucial early educational skills such as fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination development; they'll also be using their imagination to create lots of pretend play scenarios, enhancing their cognitive skills! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 24.5 x 12 x 13 inches; Weight: 2lbs; Color: Multicolor; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
